creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #8)

> Compared with Rust 1.18.0?
Build time increased doubled ...

I think that for this reason (from commit message):
... The build process should now honor ${MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER} instead of always
using all available CPU cores.

> With default options?
Yes.
